title: coupon — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two class-level attributes for listener discovery. `AsCouponListener` subscribes to coupon lifecycle events (created / activated / deactivated / expired / usage_cap_reached / issued); `AsCouponRedemptionListener` subscribes to redemption events (redeemed / refused / reversed / clawback_requested / clawback_completed). Discovery loader picks up each class at boot + wires the declared events. No property-level attributes: the two owned rows use ordinary Eloquent + spatie/laravel-data class attributes shipped by foundation.

attributes.name: AsCouponListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to coupon lifecycle events (CouponCreated / CouponUpdated / CouponActivated / CouponDeactivated / CouponExpired / CouponUsageCapReached / CouponIssuedByReferralProgram / CouponIssuedManually / CouponReportGenerated).

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event short names. Empty = subscribe to every Coupon* event.

params.name: queue
params.description: Optional queue override. Falls back to the event's default queue (coupons or coupons-critical).

attributes.name: AsCouponRedemptionListener
attributes.description: Marks a service as a subscriber to redemption lifecycle events (CouponRedeemed / CouponRedemptionRefused / CouponRedemptionReversed / CouponClawbackRequested / CouponClawbackCompleted). CouponRedeemed + CouponClawbackCompleted are queue='coupons-critical' by default because they trigger downstream finance + marketing lane events.

params.name: queue
params.description: Critical consumers (finance bridge, marketing fanout) should override to `coupons-critical`.
